tech_news.title: Available for Xbox Insiders: More Groups on Home, Custom User Colors, Quick Resume Settings, and More - Xbox Wire
Hundreds of Millions of iPhones Can Be Hacked With a New Tool Found in the Wild - WIRED
tech_news.description: A powerful iPhone-hacking technique known as DarkSword has been discovered in use by Russian hackers. It can take over devices running iOS 18 that simply visit infected websites.

tech_news.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far? - The Verge
tech_news.description: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 technology uses AI to “achieve photorealism” by adjusting a game’s look in real-time, but so far a lot of gamers don’t like it.

tech_news.title: Death Stranding 2 details new PC and PS5 features with stunning launch trailer as Steam build leaks ahead of launch - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Death Stranding 2 has detailed its long list of new content and graphical features coming to the PC and PS5 versions of the game. The PC port has leaked, too.

tech_news.title: Benchmarks show MacBook Neo rivaling more powerful cloud servers in database workloads - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: DuckDB compared the MacBook Neo with a range of cloud servers to see how Apple’s new entry-level laptop performs on heavy database workloads.

tech_news.title: CERN Discovers New Particle After Upgrading Large Hadron Collider - ScienceAlert
tech_news.description: The Large Hadron Collider has discovered a new particle, the 80th identified so far by the world's most powerful particle smasher, Europe's CERN physics laboratory announced Tuesday.

tech_news.title: Samsung Halts Sale of Galaxy Z TriFold After Just 3 Months - CNET
tech_news.description: The 10-inch device cost nearly $3,000 and will no longer be available to buy in the US or South Korea.
